CustomField.description: Minimum return conditions as per current contract. This field is linked to the Forecast. The previous name was End of Lease Return Conditions but was renamed to the correct name
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Minimum return conditions as per current contract. This field is linked to the Forecast.
CustomField.label: Minimum Lease Return Conditions

lookupFilter.errorMessage: Please select Return Condition value for Minimum Lease Return Condition field.
